judge_thought: Explanation: The phrase indicates a political lieutenant who served under two party leaders during their term—i.e., the party leader column lists both the predecessor and the successor leaders. In the table, only two rows show two party leaders: Claude Wagner (Robert Stanfield and Joe Clark) and André Bachand (Joe Clark and Peter MacKay). All other entries list a single leader. Therefore, the prediction "claude wagner|andré bachand" correctly identifies the relevant political lieutenants.
